verses.arabicText: خُشَّعًا أَبْصَٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌۭ مُّنتَشِرٌۭ
verses.translationText: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading,

verses.arabicText: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ ۖ يَقُولُ ٱلْكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌۭ
verses.translationText: Racing ahead toward the Caller. The disbelievers will say, "This is a difficult Day."

verses.arabicText: ۞ كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍۢ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌۭ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
verses.translationText: The people of Noah denied before them, and they denied Our servant and said, "A madman," and he was repelled.

verses.arabicText: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌۭ فَٱنتَصِرْ
verses.translationText: So he invoked his Lord, "Indeed, I am overpowered, so help."

verses.arabicText: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍۢ مُّنْهَمِرٍۢ
verses.translationText: Then We opened the gates of the heaven with rain pouring down

verses.arabicText: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًۭا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍۢ قَدْ قُدِرَ
verses.translationText: And caused the earth to burst with springs, and the waters met for a matter already predestined.

verses.arabicText: وَحَمَلْنَٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٰحٍۢ وَدُسُرٍۢ
verses.translationText: And We carried him on a [construction of] planks and nails,

verses.arabicText: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءًۭ لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
verses.translationText: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied.

verses.arabicText: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنَٰهَآ ءَايَةًۭ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
verses.translationText: And We left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember?

verses.arabicText: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.translationText: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

verses.arabicText: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
verses.translationText: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

verses.arabicText: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌۭ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.translationText: 'Aad denied; and how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

verses.arabicText: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًۭا صَرْصَرًۭا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍۢ مُّسْتَمِرٍّۢ
verses.translationText: Indeed, We sent upon them a screaming wind on a day of continuous misfortune,

verses.arabicText: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍۢ مُّنقَعِرٍۢ
verses.translationText: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted.

verses.arabicText: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.translationText: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

verses.arabicText: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
verses.translationText: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

verses.arabicText: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.translationText: Thamud denied the warning

verses.arabicText: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًۭا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدًۭا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًۭا لَّفِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ وَسُعُرٍ
verses.translationText: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness.

verses.arabicText: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌۭ
verses.translationText: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar."

verses.arabicText: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًۭا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ
verses.translationText: They will know tomorrow who is the insolent liar.

verses.arabicText: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةًۭ لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ
verses.translationText: Indeed, We are sending the she-camel as trial for them, so watch them and be patient.
